result.stdout:
Description:
  MinVer CLI 8.0.0-alpha.1+build.20743572046.1.f04547c25e0c91bc252506b27c235c0f136ee739

Usage:
  minver [<workingDirectory>] [options]

Arguments:
  <workingDirectory>  Working directory [default: .]

Options:
  -a, --auto-increment <auto-increment>                                    major, minor, or patch (default)
  -b, --build-metadata <build-metadata>
  -p, --default-pre-release-identifiers <default-pre-release-identifiers>  alpha.0 (default), preview.0, etc.
  -d, --default-pre-release-phase <default-pre-release-phase>              alpha (default), preview, etc.
  -i, --ignore-height                                                      Use the latest tag (or root commit) as-is, without adding height
  -m, --minimum-major-minor <minimum-major-minor>                          1.0, 1.1, 2.0, etc.
  -t, --tag-prefix <tag-prefix>
  -v, --verbosity <verbosity>                                              e[rror], w[arn], i[nfo] (default), d[ebug], or t[race] (case insensitive)
  -?, -h, --help                                                           Show help and usage information
  --version                                                                Show version information
